sentences.target: Ich brauche die Qualifikation für den Job.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈbʁaʊ̯xə diː kvaliˌfikaˈtsioːn fyːɐ̯ deːn dʒɔp/

translations.de: Ich brauche die Qualifikation für den Job.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈbʁaʊ̯xə diː kvaliˌfikaˈtsioːn fyːɐ̯ deːn dʒɔp/
translations.en: I need the qualification for the job.
translations.es: Necesito la cualificación para el trabajo.
translations.fr: J'ai besoin des qualifications pour ce poste.
translations.it: Mi servono i requisiti per il lavoro.
translations.ko: 그 일에 필요한 자격이 있어야 해.
translations.zh-Hans: 我需要这份工作的资格。
translations.ru: Мне нужна квалификация для этой работы.
translations.pt: Preciso da qualificação para o emprego.
translations.tr: Bu iş için gerekli niteliklere ihtiyacım var.
translations.vi: Tôi cần đủ điều kiện cho công việc.
translations.nl: Ik heb de juiste kwalificaties voor de baan nodig.
translations.hu: Szükségem van a képesítésre ehhez a munkához.
translations.hi: मुझे नौकरी के लिए योग्यता चाहिए।
translations.el: Χρειάζομαι τα προσόντα για τη δουλειά.
translations.nb: Jeg trenger den nødvendige kvalifikasjonen for jobben.
translations.id: Saya butuh kualifikasi untuk pekerjaan itu.
translations.ro: Am nevoie de calificare pentru job.
translations.da: Jeg har brug for kvalifikationerne til jobbet.
translations.ja: その仕事に必要な資格が要ります。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; selects a direct object in the accusative.
Definite article, feminine singular, accusative; determiner of ‘Qualifikation’ as direct object.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object indicating the credential/qualification needed.
Preposition governing the accusative; introduces a purpose/target PP.
Definite article, masculine singular, accusative; determiner of ‘Job’ required by ‘für’.
Common noun, masculine singular; complement of the preposition ‘für’.

sentences.target: Sie hat die Qualifikation für die Stelle.
sentences.reading: /ziː hat diː kvaliˌfikaˈtsioːn fyːɐ̯ diː ˈʃtɛlə/

translations.de: Sie hat die Qualifikation für die Stelle.
translations.ipa: /ziː hat diː kvaliˌfikaˈtsioːn fyːɐ̯ diː ˈʃtɛlə/
translations.en: She has the qualification for the position.
translations.fr: Elle est qualifiée pour le poste.
translations.ko: 그녀는 그 직책에 필요한 자격이 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 她具备这个职位的资格。
translations.ru: У неё есть квалификация для этой должности.
translations.pt: Ela tem a qualificação para a vaga.
translations.vi: Cô ấy đủ điều kiện cho vị trí đó.
translations.nl: Ze is gekwalificeerd voor de functie.
translations.hu: Megvan a képesítése erre a pozícióra.
translations.hi: वह इस पद के लिए योग्य है।
translations.pl: Ona ma kwalifikacje na to stanowisko.
translations.el: Έχει τα προσόντα για τη θέση.
translations.id: Dia punya kualifikasi untuk posisi itu.
translations.ja: 彼女はその職に必要な資格を持っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular, nominative (feminine); subject.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes a direct object.
Definite article, feminine singular, accusative; determiner of the direct object ‘Qualifikation’.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object meaning credentials/qualification.
Preposition governing the accusative; introduces the PP specifying target/position.
Definite article, feminine singular, accusative; determiner of ‘Stelle’ after ‘für’.
Common noun, feminine singular; complement of the preposition ‘für’.

sentences.target: Er verpasst die Qualifikation für das Finale.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ fɛɐ̯ˈpast diː kvaliˌfikaˈtsioːn fyːɐ̯ das fiˈnaːlə/

translations.de: Er verpasst die Qualifikation für das Finale.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ fɛɐ̯ˈpast diː kvaliˌfikaˈtsioːn fyːɐ̯ das fiˈnaːlə/
translations.en: He misses qualifying for the final.
translations.es: No se clasifica para la final.
translations.fr: Il ne se qualifie pas pour la finale.
translations.it: Non riesce a qualificarsi per la finale.
translations.pt: Ele não se classifica para a final.
translations.vi: Anh ấy không vượt qua vòng loại vào chung kết.
translations.nl: Hij plaatst zich niet voor de finale.
translations.hi: वह फाइनल के लिए क्वालिफाई नहीं कर पाता।
translations.el: Δεν καταφέρνει να προκριθεί στον τελικό.
translations.sv: Han kvalar inte in till finalen.
translations.da: Han kvalificerer sig ikke til finalen.
translations.ja: 彼は決勝に進出できない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular, nominative (masculine); subject.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes a direct object.
Definite article, feminine singular, accusative; determiner of ‘Qualifikation’ as direct object.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object, here referring to the qualifying stage/event.
Preposition governing the accusative; introduces a PP expressing the goal stage.
Definite article, neuter singular, accusative; determiner of ‘Finale’ after ‘für’.
Common noun, neuter singular; complement of the preposition ‘für’.

sentences.target: Die Qualifikation beginnt morgen im Stadion.

translations.de: Die Qualifikation beginnt morgen am Stadion.
translations.en: The qualifying starts tomorrow at the stadium.
translations.es: Las clasificatorias empiezan mañana en el estadio.
translations.fr: Les qualifications commencent demain au stade.
translations.it: Le qualificazioni iniziano domani allo stadio.
translations.zh-Hans: 资格赛明天在体育场开始。
translations.yue: 資格賽明天喺體育場開始。
translations.pt: As classificatórias começam amanhã no estádio.
translations.vi: Vòng loại bắt đầu vào ngày mai tại sân vận động.
translations.nl: De kwalificaties beginnen morgen in het stadion.
translations.uk: Відбіркові змагання починаються завтра на стадіоні.
translations.hu: A selejtező holnap a stadionban kezdődik.
translations.hi: क्वालिफाइंग कल स्टेडियम में शुरू होता है।
translations.pl: Eliminacje zaczynają się jutro na stadionie.
translations.el: Οι προκριματικοί ξεκινούν αύριο στο στάδιο.
translations.nb: Kvalifiseringen starter i morgen på stadion.
translations.id: Babak kualifikasi mulai besok di stadion.
translations.sv: Kvalet börjar i morgon på stadion.
translations.da: Kvalifikationen starter i morgen på stadion.
translations.ja: 予選は明日、スタジアムで始まります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular, nominative; determiner of the subject ‘Qualifikation’.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject, here referring to the qualifying event/round.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; intransitive usage indicating start.
Temporal adverb indicating time of the event.
Contracted form of ‘in dem’, introducing a locative PP; governs dative.
Common noun, neuter singular; object of the preposition ‘in’ in dative, marking location.
